signals.headline: Cavs Lead Raptors 2-0 After Game 2 Win (115-105), No Conference Semifinals Advancement Yet; No Cooper Flagg or Rookie Se
signals.raw:
Cavs Lead Raptors 2-0 After Game 2 Win (115-105), No Conference Semifinals Advancement Yet; No Cooper Flagg or Rookie Series Winner Confirmed** | NO | HIGH confidence

The Toronto Raptors, No. 5 seed in the Eastern Conference, lost Game 1 (126-113) and Game 2 (115-105) to the No. 4 Cleveland Cavaliers in their first-round playoff series, giving Cleveland a 2-0 lead with home-court advantage.[1][3]
matched_markets: Will Cooper Flagg win the 2025–26 NBA Rookie of the Year award?

signals.headline: US-Iran Ceasefire Extended (April 22, 2026)** | YES | MED confidence[3]
signals.raw:
US-Iran Ceasefire Extended (April 22, 2026)** | YES | MED confidence[3]

Goldman Sachs' U.S. Inflation Monitor (released April 20) confirms March 2026 headline CPI at 3.29% YoY (up 0.87% MoM) and PCE at 3.45% YoY, driven by 45% oil spike to $103/bbl from Iran war, though core inflation decelerates with forecasts for 2.2% PCE by late 2026 enabling potential Fed cuts[1][2].
